segment_definitions.description: Identify coherent editorial units and meaningful directorial beats. Use visible composition, camera-angle changes, cuts, dissolves, speaker or attention changes, reveals, reactions, and action completion. Do not infer exact focal length or physical camera path.

fields.name: unit_type
fields.description: One of shot, transition, reaction, reveal, insert, cutaway, montage, or unknown.

fields.name: shot_scale
fields.description: Dominant visible framing category.

fields.name: audience_function
fields.description: A cautious interpretation of what this unit makes visible or understandable to the audience; use unknown if unsupported.

fields.name: evidence
fields.description: Specific visible or audible cues supporting the boundary and label.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence from 0 to 1 in the proposed unit and metadata.

segment_definitions.description: Identify temporally coherent physical objectives with preparation, execution, and completion or interruption. For combat or stunt footage, distinguish visible action from constructed impact and never claim force or real contact when occluded.

fields.name: participants
fields.description: Local participant labels such as actor_A and actor_B; do not identify private persons.

fields.name: action_family
fields.description: One of locomotion, approach, evade, strike_like, block, grapple, fall, recovery, object_interaction, gesture, or unknown.

fields.name: causal_phases
fields.description: Visible phases selected from prepare, initiate, accelerate, apex, contact_candidate, follow_through, reaction, recovery, interrupted, and unknown.

fields.name: visible_result
fields.description: What visibly changes by the end of the phrase.

fields.name: contact_status
fields.description: Visible contact interpretation.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence from 0 to 1.

segment_definitions.description: Identify meaningful changes in visible performance: gaze target, head orientation, posture, gesture, facial-region activity, speech behavior, or whole-body movement quality. Treat affect and Laban labels as interpretations and use unknown when evidence is weak.

fields.name: performer
fields.description: Local performer ID.

fields.name: observable_change
fields.description: Specific visible or audible change without assuming private mental state.

fields.name: movement_quality
fields.description: Candidate qualities selected from sudden, sustained, strong, light, direct, indirect, bound, free, rising, sinking, advancing, retreating, or unknown.

fields.name: affect_hypothesis
fields.description: Optional portrayal hypothesis, explicitly uncertain; use unknown when unsupported.

fields.name: specialist_measurement_needed
fields.description: Any required dense checks such as FACS, gaze, 3D_pose, local_phase, or breath.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence from 0 to 1.

segment_definitions.description: For creator, testimonial, demo, or advertisement video, identify observable communication beats. Interpret sales purpose cautiously and do not claim causal conversion effects.

fields.name: beat_type
fields.description: One of hook, problem, context, demonstration, mechanism, proof, objection, offer, CTA, end_card, transition, or unknown.

fields.name: lens_address
fields.description: Whether the principal speaker visibly addresses the camera lens.

fields.name: product_visibility
fields.description: One of absent, peripheral, visible, handled, hero, occluded, or unknown.

fields.name: on_screen_text_role
fields.description: Observable role of captions or graphics, such as transcript, claim, proof, price, CTA, or none.

fields.name: communication_hypothesis
fields.description: Why this beat may exist in the communication structure; this is interpretation, not proof of sales effect.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence from 0 to 1.

segment_definitions.description: Identify localized stylization and audiovisual impact construction, including speed lines, trails, particles, dust, flash frames, smear-like frames, time remapping, camera shake, music accents, sound transients, and silence. Describe appearance, not the hidden production method.

fields.name: effect_type
fields.description: Visible or audible effect category.

fields.name: attachment
fields.description: Body part, prop, environment, camera, screen region, edit, or unknown.

fields.name: visual_evidence
fields.description: Visible cues supporting the label.

fields.name: audio_evidence
fields.description: Audible cues supporting the label.

fields.name: perceptual_function
fields.description: Cautious interpretation such as amplify speed, mark impact, redirect attention, hide contact, or unknown.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Confidence from 0 to 1.
